mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses demand for goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing market signals a decrease in demand for goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 1000 units in 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in industrial production signals a strengthening supply of goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the GDP growth rate signals an increase in demand for goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 rises above 25000 in 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the monetary policy rate signals a decrease in the cost of borrowing, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor force participation rate signals a decrease in the labor market's ability to support economic growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises above 5.0pp in 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the consumer price index signals a decrease in demand for goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the industrial production rate signals a strengthening supply of goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises above 120 in 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
